text: Hello and welcome to Real Easy English.
zh: 大家好,欢迎收听《Real Easy English》。

text: In this podcast we have real conversations in easy English to help you learn.
zh: 在这个播客里,我们用简单的英语进行真实的对话,帮助大家学习。

text: I'm Georgie. And I'm Beth. You can find a video of this podcast
zh: 我是Georgie。我是Beth。你可以在我们的网站上找到这期播客的视频

text: and a worksheet to help you practice what you've learnt on our website bbclearningenglish .com.
zh: 以及一份练习题,帮助你巩固所学内容,网址是bbclearningenglish.com。

text: How are you today Beth? I'm very well thank you, how are you? Yes I'm pretty good thank you.
zh: Beth,你今天怎么样?我很好,谢谢,你呢?我也挺好的,谢谢。

text: Good. So what are we talking about today? Well Beth today we are talking about places.
zh: 很好。那我们今天聊什么呢?Beth,今天我们聊的是关于地方的话题。

text: We'll talk about the city and the countryside and which we prefer.
zh: 我们会聊聊城市和乡村,以及我们更喜欢哪一个。

text: Very nice, okay let's start then. So Georgie,
zh: 太好了,那我们开始吧。Georgie,

text: If you were going to visit somewhere, for example, would you prefer to visit the city or the countryside?
zh: 如果你要去某个地方旅行,比如说,你会更愿意去城市还是乡村?

text: Are we talking about the UK or going abroad? Let's start with the UK.
zh: 我们说的是英国国内,还是出国旅行?先说英国吧。

text: Okay. If I visit somewhere in the UK, I would usually want to go to the countryside.
zh: 好的。如果我在英国国内旅行,我通常会想去乡村。

text: That's because I live in a city. I live in London, but I'm from the countryside.
zh: 那是因为我住在城市里。我住在伦敦,但我来自乡村。

text: side so sometimes I crave going out into a more rural area where I can see more green space
zh: 所以有时候我很渴望去更乡村的地方,那里能看到更多的绿地,

text: there's more wildlife it's almost like you need to escape the the busy hustle and bustle of the city
zh: 也有更多的野生动物,就好像你需要逃离城市里那种忙碌喧嚣的感觉。

text: yeah do you know I I completely agree with you
zh: 是啊,我完全同意你的看法。

text: cities in the UK are great there are some great cities but
zh: 英国的城市都很棒,有不少很好的城市,不过

text: I have visited quite a lot of them and after a while the cities are all similar
zh: 我去过挺多城市,时间久了会觉得这些城市都差不多。

text: whereas the countryside you can do different activities it's really nice to see new places
zh: 而乡村就不一样了,你可以做各种不同的活动,能看到新鲜的地方真的很好。

text: I um a few years ago I went to Kent and I had never been to Kent before because I'm from the north of England
zh: 我几年前去了肯特郡,之前从没去过,因为我来自英格兰北部,

text: and Kent is in the south and it was amazing
zh: 而肯特郡在南部,那次旅行真的很棒。

text: they had different kinds of buildings and like architecture on the farms we don't have those
zh: 那里的建筑风格不一样,农场的建筑样式也不同,我们那边没有那种。

text: same kind of roofs in the farms in the in the north
zh: 北方农场里那种屋顶样式。

text: yeah I also went to Kent last year I did but I went to the seaside because Kent also has a bit of coastline
zh: 是啊,我去年也去了肯特郡,不过我是去海边玩的,因为肯特郡也有一部分海岸线。

text: yeah and yeah I really enjoyed visiting Kent
zh: 没错,我也很喜欢去肯特郡。

text: and the villages are so like cute and picturesque we could say.
zh: 那里的村庄真的特别可爱,可以说是如画一般。

text: What about when you go abroad do you do you also visit the countryside in other countries?
zh: 那你出国旅行的时候,也会去乡村吗?

text: I have done but to be honest I would normally go to a city if I go abroad
zh: 去过,不过说实话,如果出国的话,我通常会去城市,

text: maybe the capital city or maybe a smaller city but one of the reasons for that
zh: 可能是首都,也可能是小一点的城市。其中一个原因是

text: I think is the transport it's so much easier to get a train or a bus
zh: 我觉得是交通问题,在城市里坐火车或公交车方便多了,

text: when you're in a city and you'd have to hire a car I think to visit a village or something like that.
zh: 如果要去乡村小镇之类的地方,可能还得租车。

text: It's very true usually if you go abroad you fly to an airport and the airports are usually closer to the city
zh: 确实是这样,一般出国旅行都是坐飞机到机场,而机场通常离城市比较近,

text: and if you only have a few days in a place it's easier to just stay in the city.
zh: 如果在一个地方只待几天,那待在城市里会更方便。

text: It's also I guess easier to do lots of like activities in the city
zh: 而且我觉得在城市里做各种活动也更容易,

text: when you visit and try out lots of the local restaurants. Everything is closer together so you can do more things.
zh: 可以去尝试很多当地的餐馆。因为一切都离得很近,能做的事情也更多。

text: Well I'm just thinking if you're in the city you can like search on your phone for really good restaurants really easily
zh: 我在想,如果你在城市里,可以很容易地用手机搜索到很棒的餐厅,

text: but if I'm in Italy for example and I don't speak Italian,
zh: 但如果我在意大利之类的地方,又不会说意大利语,

text: it would be really difficult, I think, for me to find a good restaurant because I wouldn't know where to go.
zh: 我觉得要找到一家好餐厅会挺难的,因为我根本不知道该去哪儿。

text: Sometimes it's the locals in the countryside that are able to tell you this.
zh: 有时候,是乡村里的当地人才能告诉你这些信息。

text: It might not even be on the internet. Yep, that's very true.
zh: 这些信息网上可能都搜不到。是啊,确实如此。

text: Let's recap the language we used in this conversation, starting with countryside,
zh: 我们来回顾一下这次对话中用到的词汇,先从“countryside”开始,

text: land outside of towns and cities where there are not many buildings.
zh: 指的是城镇和城市以外的地区,那里建筑物不多。

text: We can also describe this with the adjective rural.
zh: 我们也可以用形容词“rural”来形容这种地方。

text: And hustle and bustle, the busyness and noise that you find in the city.
zh: 还有“hustle and bustle”,指城市里那种忙碌喧闹的景象。

text: We had picturesque which means pretty or beautiful and we often use this to describe a place.
zh: 我们还提到了“picturesque”,意思是漂亮、美丽,常用来形容一个地方。

text: And visits to go somewhere for a short time.
zh: 还有“visit”,意思是去某个地方短暂停留。

text: That's it for this episode of real easy English.
zh: 这就是本期《Real Easy English》的全部内容。

text: Go to our website to find a worksheet to test what you've learned.
zh: 欢迎访问我们的网站,获取练习题,检验一下你学到的内容。

text: bbclearningenglish .com. See you then. Goodbye.
zh: 网址是bbclearningenglish.com。我们下期再见,拜拜。
